# S&H Painting

> Professional residential and commercial painting services.

S&H Painting provides high-quality interior and exterior painting, cabinet refinishing, and commercial painting services. We focus on meticulous preparation, clean execution, and lasting results.

## Services

- **Interior Painting**: Wall & ceiling painting, trim & door refinishing, cabinet painting, color consultation.
- **Exterior Painting**: Siding & stucco painting, deck & fence staining, pressure washing, surface preparation.
- **Commercial Painting**: Office spaces, retail stores, industrial facilities, maintenance painting.
- **Specialty Finishes**: Faux finishes, texture application, wallpaper removal, drywall repair.

## Contact Information

- **Email**: info@smpainting.com
- **Phone**: (555) 123-4567
- **Address**: 123 Main St, Your City, ST 12345, US

## Brand Values

- **Prep-Driven Process**: Clean lines and thorough preparation.
- **Low-Disruption Workdays**: Respectful crews that minimize impact on your daily life.
- **Nothing Left Unfinished**: A final walkthrough ensures complete satisfaction.
